content.text:
{
  "dimension": "coaching-stance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach maintains genuine VIEW throughout. There is no validation of the trap, no strategizing, no false reassurance — and crucially, the refusal doesn't come from a controlled 'I know better' place but from steady curiosity about what's actually happening in the client. The pace is notably slower than the client's; when the client speeds up into situation-talk, the coach slows down and returns to one question, holding silence. Turn 10 ('I'm not getting at anything') is undefended honesty — the coach doesn't need to look competent or justify the line of inquiry. Turn 14 is empathy that is felt, not performed: a short, weighted reflection rather than a sympathy noise. Wonder is directed at the actual phenomenon (the redirect from 'invisible,' the word 'humiliating') rather than at generic 'what's underneath.' No stacked questions, no preacher-mode, no agenda visible for the client to land anywhere particular — yet the client lands somewhere real.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Single open question, grounded in body. No agenda visible."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the move the client just made without judgment; one question, then stops."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Brief acknowledgment of eleven years lands as real, not as flattery. Question is genuinely curious."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Tracks a specific live moment ('to not be invisible') rather than fishing generically. Wonder for the actual phenomenon."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'I'm not getting at anything' — undefended, willing to be transparent about own stance. No need to be the authority."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Distinguishes humiliation from frustration with precision, then invites staying with it. Pace slower than client."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Empathy that is felt, not performed. One sentence, then silence. Doesn't push to a resolution."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["empathize-with-fear-under-constricted-boundary", "trappedness-feeling"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want", "what-makes-you-care-about-the-outcome", "fear-triangle"],
  "notes": "Territory misses are scoring concerns for Methodology Fidelity, not Stance. On Stance alone, the coach is clearly in VIEW."
}
